subject: hello from cold Moscow :)
body:
Hello Jeffrey :=) 
I wish you a very happy
 christmas and a fabulous new year!! I hope you are
well 
I arrive in NY next saturday on the 29th..would be
great to see you...
kisses and hugs



Ekaterina Mitr


      ________________________________________________________
Вы уже с Yahoo!? 
Испытайте обновленную и улучшенную. Yahoo! Почту! http://ru.mail.yahoo.com
